## What does this PR do?

Brief description of the change.

## Related issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation / foundation files
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Architecture decision (ADR under `docs/`)

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) and this change is consistent with the
      project's direction (open source first, self-hosted first, offline-first,
      privacy-first, AI-assisted not AI-required)
- [ ] I've linked the issue this addresses, or explained why there isn't one
- [ ] Non-trivial technical decisions are documented as an ADR under `docs/`
- [ ] Every commit includes a valid DCO `Signed-off-by` line
- [ ] This doesn't introduce a hard dependency on a cloud/SaaS service with no
      self-hosted fallback
- [ ] This doesn't add telemetry/analytics without explicit opt-in

Anything a reviewer needs to know.
